moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The climax of the 2026 FIFA World Cup is set for Sunday, July 19, in New York/New Jersey, as the global football tournament concludes.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Seven days to go! The FIFA World Cup Final kicks off next Sunday. Who are you backing for glory?

angles.name: Build-up
angles.copy: All eyes on New York/New Jersey next Sunday for the World Cup final. The biggest prize in football is almost decided!

angles.name: UK Interest
angles.copy: With England's amazing run, the World Cup fever is peaking! Can they go all the way in New York next Sunday?

moments.title: The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins this Thursday, July 16, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, running until Sunday.

angles.name: Start of Tournament
angles.copy: Major golf action kicks off this week! The Open Championship returns to Royal Birkdale on Thursday. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Local Buzz
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is ready! The Open Championship is back in Southport from Thursday, bringing the world's best golfers to England.

angles.name: Weather Watch
angles.copy: It's going to be a hot one at Royal Birkdale this week for The Open! Perfect conditions for some scorching golf, perhaps?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean make chart history
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is set for a 17th week at UK #1, breaking the record for the longest-running British single in chart history, while Madonna secures her 13th UK #1 album.

angles.name: New Record
angles.copy: History made! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is now the longest-running British #1 single ever. What a track!

angles.name: Madonna Album
angles.copy: Queen of Pop still reigns! Madonna bags her 13th UK #1 album, making her the first American woman to top the charts across five decades. Incredible!

angles.name: Football Fever
angles.copy: World Cup fever is hitting the charts! Football anthems are climbing fast this week. What's your favourite stadium sing-along?

moments.title: Tribute to Bonnie Tyler
moments.blurb: Following her sad passing this week, the legendary Bonnie Tyler's 'Total Eclipse of the Heart' is re-entering the UK charts.

angles.name: Chart Re-entry
angles.copy: A fitting tribute. Bonnie Tyler's iconic 'Total Eclipse of the Heart' is back in the charts following her sad passing this week. A true legend.

angles.name: Welsh Icon
angles.copy: Wales remembers a legend. Bonnie Tyler's incredible voice and unforgettable hits live on. 'Total Eclipse' back in the charts.

angles.name: Timeless Hit
angles.copy: Still giving us a 'Total Eclipse of the Heart'. What's your favourite Bonnie Tyler memory or song?

moments.title: Big Love Festival in Monmouthshire
moments.blurb: Big Love Festival, a celebration of music and arts, kicks off this Thursday, July 16, and runs until July 19 in Monmouthshire, Wales.

angles.name: Local Festival
angles.copy: Get ready, Wales! Big Love Festival starts this Thursday in Monmouthshire. Who's heading down for a weekend of music and good vibes?

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Looking for weekend plans? Big Love Festival brings a fantastic lineup to Monmouthshire from Thursday. Don't miss out!

moments.title: Splendour Festival Nottingham
moments.blurb: Nottingham's biggest festival, Splendour, takes place this weekend, July 18-19, at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park.

angles.name: Festival Weekend
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is this weekend! Nottingham's Wollaton Hall will be buzzing with music. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Regional Event
angles.copy: Nottingham calling! Splendour Festival brings a huge lineup to Wollaton Hall this Saturday and Sunday. Get your tickets!

moments.title: Brian May turns 79
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday on Friday, July 19.

angles.name: Happy Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Dr. Brian May! Guitar legend, astrophysicist, and rock icon. What's your favourite Queen riff?

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: He gave us 'Bohemian Rhapsody' and so much more! Sending birthday wishes to Queen's incredible Brian May, turning 79 on Friday.

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: The iconic Mexican-American guitarist Carlos Santana, known for pioneering Latin rock, celebrates his 79th birthday on Saturday, July 20.

angles.name: Birthday Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Carlos Santana! His guitar work is instantly recognisable. What's your favourite Santana track?

angles.name: Latin Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Carlos Santana, who turns 79 on Saturday! A true pioneer of Latin rock.

moments.title: Martha Reeves turns 85
moments.blurb: Motown legend Martha Reeves, lead singer of Martha and the Vandellas, celebrates her 85th birthday on Thursday, July 18.

angles.name: Motown Icon
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the incredible Martha Reeves! Her voice defined a generation with Martha and the Vandellas. What's your favourite Motown hit?

angles.name: Dancing in the Street
angles.copy: Still dancing in the street! Sending birthday wishes to Martha Reeves, turning 85 on Thursday. A true living legend.

moments.title: Paul Cook turns 70
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, drummer for the iconic punk rock band The Sex Pistols, celebrates his 70th birthday on Saturday, July 20.

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to Paul Cook, the legendary drummer of The Sex Pistols! Still creating chaos and music.

angles.name: Anarchy in the UK
angles.copy: Celebrating Paul Cook of The Sex Pistols, turning 70 on Saturday! The beat behind some of punk's most iconic tracks.

moments.title: Fred again.. turns 33
moments.blurb: Award-winning British DJ and producer Fred again.. celebrates his 33rd birthday on Friday, July 19.

angles.name: Birthday Beats
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Fred again..! The producer and DJ continues to dominate the dance music scene.

angles.name: UK Talent
angles.copy: Celebrating British talent! Fred again.. turns 33 on Friday. What's your favourite track he's produced or remixed?

moments.title: Dan Reynolds (Imagine Dragons) turns 39
moments.blurb: Dan Reynolds, the lead singer of multi-platinum rock band Imagine Dragons, celebrates his 39th birthday on Tuesday, July 14.

angles.name: Birthday Rocker
angles.copy: Happy 39th Birthday to Dan Reynolds of Imagine Dragons! Bring on the 'Thunder'!

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Celebrating Dan Reynolds, the voice behind so many huge Imagine Dragons hits, turning 39 tomorrow! What's your favourite?

moments.title: Richard Marx turns 57
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Richard Marx, known for hits like 'Right Here Waiting', celebrates his 57th birthday on Thursday, July 16.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the incredible Richard Marx! Still 'Right Here Waiting' for more great music.

angles.name: Power Ballad King
angles.copy: Celebrating Richard Marx, turning 57 on Thursday! The voice behind some of the greatest power ballads. What's your favourite?

moments.title: Geezer Butler (Black Sabbath) turns 77
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the legendary bassist and lyricist for heavy metal pioneers Black Sabbath, celebrates his 77th birthday on Friday, July 17.

angles.name: Metal Legend
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the godfather of heavy metal bass, Geezer Butler of Black Sabbath! A true icon.

angles.name: Brummie Hero
angles.copy: Celebrating Birmingham's own Geezer Butler, turning 77 on Friday! The lyrical genius behind Black Sabbath's greatest tracks.

moments.title: M.I.A. turns 51
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, and songwriter M.I.A., known for her experimental sound and global hits, celebrates her 51st birthday on Thursday, July 18.

angles.name: Birthday Rapper
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible M.I.A.! A true innovator in music. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Global Sound
angles.copy: Celebrating M.I.A. on her 51st birthday this Thursday! Her unique sound has influenced so many.
